name: pydeseq2
description: Differential expression analysis with pydeseq2 (Python DESeq2). RNA-seq count data, negative binomial modeling, fold change shrinkage.

name: scikit-survival
description: Survival analysis with scikit-survival. Cox proportional hazards, Kaplan-Meier, concordance index, time-dependent AUC.

name: statistical-analysis
description: Statistical testing, regression, and modeling. Hypothesis tests, ANOVA, correlation, effect sizes, power analysis.

name: scientific-visualization
description: Publication-quality scientific figures. Chart selection, matplotlib/seaborn best practices, export for journals.

name: gget
description: Query genomics databases (Ensembl, UniProt, NCBI, PDB). Gene info, sequence retrieval, ID conversion, enrichment analysis.

name: umap-learn
description: UMAP dimensionality reduction. Nonlinear manifold learning for visualization and clustering preprocessing.

name: gsea-enrichment
description: Gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA) and over-representation analysis (ORA) with gseapy. Pathway interpretation of DEG lists.

name: data-quality-control
description: Data auditing and quality control. Missing values, distributions, outliers, sample-level QC, consistency checks.
